lore.english:
A UFS soldier. Originally served in an infantry division, but had lost all her teammates in a certain operation, herself losing all her limbs, making her change into a cyborg soldier. She now doesn't belong to a specific unit, and acts alone as a guerrilla operative. She puts distance between her and the others on purpose, acting cold, but her original personality is warm-hearted, so she helps others in secret.

Her main weapon is a plasma rifle. She self-generates by using the kinetic energy from her android arms and legs, supplying the electron ammo for the plasma rifle almost permanently.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&ATK] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase ATK of Sun allies by 45% in Special Ops
skills.description_readable: Increase ATK of Sun allies by 45% in Special Ops

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Plasma Rifle[-]
skills.description:
Fires a plasma rifle at the enemy.
Removes [&DmgBlockCount] from the target hit.
skills.description_readable:
Fires a plasma rifle at the enemy.
Removes Protective Shield from the target hit.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Frontline Artillery Support[-]
skills.description:
Gains [&CountAttack] when hit by an all-target attack.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2260201] turn(s)
Reduces damage taken from all-target attacks by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2260202]%)[-].
skills.description_readable:
Gains Counterattack when hit by an all-target attack.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Reduces damage taken from all-target attacks by (-7.5%).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Plasma Rifle: Burst[-]
skills.description:
Charges the plasma rifle, and fires it [A:22603] time(s) at the enemy.
Performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2260302]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
If the character is left alone in the squad, the last attack reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the target by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2260303]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2260303]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Charges the plasma rifle, and fires it [A:22603] time(s) at the enemy.
Performs a (60%) DEF Penetrate attack.
If the character is left alone in the squad, the last attack reduces the Turn Gauge of the target by (15%) at a 85% chance.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_22601]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_22603]
skill_data.description:
Charges the plasma rifle, and fires it [A:22613] time(s) at the enemy.
Performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2260302]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
If only 1 enemy is left, the last attack reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the target by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2260303]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2261303]%[-] chance.
skill_data.description_readable:
Charges the plasma rifle, and fires it [A:22613] time(s) at the enemy.
Performs a (60%) DEF Penetrate attack.
If only 1 enemy is left, the last attack reduces the Turn Gauge of the target by (15%) at a 85% chance.
